overall.description: A first-person exploration of a cyberpunk apartment interior from Cyberpunk 2077, featuring a blend of futuristic technology and traditional Asian decor. The player moves from a sunlit window overlooking a dense futuristic cityscape through dimly lit living spaces, ending with an intimate interaction lighting incense at a Buddhist altar with a golden dragon statue.

agents.ego_description: standing by the window looking out at the futuristic cityscape, then slowly panning right along the window sill

entered.detail: tall industrial windows with green frames overlooking the city
dense futuristic buildings and industrial structures visible through the glass
small green plant sitting on the window sill
large red and silver ventilation pipes outside the window
wooden chest with items on top near the window

segments.scene_description: The clip opens with a view through large industrial windows of a dense cyberpunk cityscape bathed in morning sunlight. The camera slowly pans right along the window sill, revealing potted plants and wooden storage chests while maintaining focus on the futuristic urban exterior with its industrial pipes and towering structures.

events.description: moving away from the bright window into the darker interior hallway

agents.ego_description: walking down the hallway away from the window, passing a tall floor lamp and approaching the main living area

entered.detail: white ceiling fan with lights hanging from the ceiling
tall rectangular paper-style lamp emitting warm light
futuristic holographic screens showing blue imagery
thick support column in the middle of the room

segments.scene_description: The camera moves away from the window into a dimly lit hallway featuring a ceiling fan and a tall floor lamp. The lighting shifts from bright natural sunlight to a mix of warm artificial light and remaining daylight. Holographic displays become visible in the background as the space opens up.

scene_state.functional_zone: kitchen and bar area with neon accents

events.description: entering the kitchen area featuring a distinctive green beaded curtain and neon lighting

agents.ego_description: turning to explore the kitchen and bar area, observing the green beaded curtain door and neon accents

entered.detail: doorway covered with hanging green beads emitting soft light
bar counter with various items and a blue stool
blue stool in front of the counter
wall-mounted board with papers and notes
cyan neon light strip above the kitchen area

segments.scene_description: The camera turns into a kitchen area defined by cyberpunk aesthetics, featuring a distinctive green beaded curtain doorway and cyan neon lighting. A bar counter with a blue stool sits beneath the neon glow, while a blackboard with notes hangs on the wall. The space feels distinctly futuristic with its artificial lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: living room with curved sofa and altar corner

events.description: moving from kitchen to living room area featuring a curved sofa and decorative altar

agents.ego_description: walking toward the living room couch and turning toward the decorative altar area with shelves

entered.detail: modern curved gray sofa with cushions
round table with magazines and items in front of the sofa
futuristic posters and artwork on the wall above the sofa
dark wooden cabinet with traditional Asian decor and candles
white and blue decorative urns on the cabinet

segments.scene_description: The camera moves into a cozy living room area featuring a curved gray sofa and coffee table. The walls display futuristic posters and holographic displays. The focus shifts toward a dark wooden altar cabinet adorned with traditional porcelain urns and lit candles, blending cyberpunk technology with traditional Asian aesthetics.

scene_state.functional_zone: traditional altar with incense and dragon statue

events.description: first-person hand lights an incense stick and places it in front of the golden dragon statue
smoke begins rising from the lit incense stick, creating trails in the air

agents.ego_description: lighting incense at the altar and observing the smoke rise in front of the golden dragon statue

entered.detail: intricate golden dragon sculpture holding a sphere
multiple candles burning on the altar surface
incense stick held by hand then placed in front of the dragon
white smoke rising from the burning incense

segments.scene_description: The camera focuses closely on the traditional altar, revealing a golden dragon statue surrounded by lit candles and porcelain urns. A hand enters the frame to light an incense stick, placing it before the dragon. Smoke begins to rise and drift through the air as the camera pans slowly across the altar, highlighting the contrast between the ancient ritual objects and the futuristic apartment setting.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a bright, industrial window overlooking a futuristic cityscape into the intimate, dimly lit depths of a cyberpunk apartment. It begins by panning across a sunlit window sill lined with potted plants and wooden chests, before moving away from the urban exterior and into a hallway where natural light fades into a mix of warm artificial glows and holographic displays. The scene then shifts into a kitchen area defined by cyan neon lighting and a green beaded curtain, eventually opening into a cozy living room with a curved gray sofa and futuristic wall posters. As the camera turns toward a dark wooden altar, the environment transitions from high-tech aesthetics to traditional Asian spirituality, focusing on porcelain urns and lit candles. Finally, the movement culminates in a close-up of a golden dragon statue as a hand enters the frame to light an incense stick, letting the smoke drift through the air.
